runtime.policy: Norway-target-market companies use Stripe for payments
runtime.countryRule: Use Stripe for companies whose primary target market includes Norway; do not route non-Norway companies to Stripe by default.

forbiddenUsecases: No refunds, disputes, payout, transfer, or key-rotation actions without a dedicated approval issue
No live-mode experiments without operator approval
Do not use another company Stripe account; each Norway-targeting company needs its own Stripe credential unless explicitly approved
No refunds, disputes, payout, transfer, or key-rotation actions without a dedicated approval issue
No live-mode experiments without operator approval
Do not use another company Stripe account; each Norway-targeting company needs its own Stripe credential unless explicitly approved

runtime.isolation: one CLI home/cache/session directory per Paperclip company
notes: Login/API-key state must be added per company; no global account is shared by default

Run dry-run/schema checks before enabling new writes
Use webhook-first or event-driven workflows where supported
Keep credentials and connection artifacts inside the company-scoped Composio home/cache/session directories

No destructive deletes without an approved Paperclip issue
No broad admin/proxy workflow unless explicitly scoped in this policy
